title: Tony's Cursed fate addon: Honoyagi
description: Addon for the mod Jujutsu Kaisen: Cursed Fate
body:
Addon for the mod Jujutsu Kaisen: Cursed Fate, adds the cursed tool Honoyagi from JJK Modulo

To craft it you combine a netherite sword, a fire charge, and Special Grade residue in a smithing table.

Right Click for a flame slash attack
